fields.title: Clean ~/.pi/agent/skills of tau-provided duplicates
fields.description: Global ~/.pi/agent/skills should not contain skills that are provided by the tau extension. Clean up duplicate tau-owned skills from the global skills directory while keeping tau copies under extensions/tau/skills.
fields.design: Compare skill directory names and skill frontmatter names between ~/.pi/agent/skills and extensions/tau/skills. Remove only duplicates that are clearly tau-provided. Leave non-tau global skills untouched.
